title: Laser Tag System
description: A team-built Java MVC application for managing laser tag games. A player entry screen collects team and player data before each match, a UDP module handles real-time network communication between equipment on port 7500 using a custom packet protocol, a Supabase integration persists player scores and history, and a controller coordinates live game state across the model and views. Includes a background music system and a Python traffic generator for load testing. (Incomplete, but core features implemented.)
shortDescription: Team Java project: MVC laser tag app with UDP networking, Supabase persistence, and music playback.
